title: Moderation Update – April 29, 2026
body:
Two high-severity reports resolved today:

• spam_wave_42 — BANNED for posting phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes.
• toxic_runner — BANNED for repeated targeted harassment against newcomers.

Additionally, reports involving trusted_helper (dispute) and core_maintainer (false positive) were reviewed and closed with no action taken.

Remaining lower-severity reports (report_004, report_005) are queued for follow-up review.

Thank you for keeping our community safe. If you see something, report it.
